wrapped.response:
The previous derivation in Cocoon 5093 assumed continuous and differentiable functions to integrate "Value of Life" over time, but this approach fails when confronted with discrete and non-linear human suffering, specifically the singularity created by Infinite Subjective Terror.

To address this blind spot, I propose introducing Event-Embedded Value (EEV), which acknowledges that each event has its own inherent value or weight. EEV recognizes that events are not just temporal but also spatial
